titleStmt.title: SII 16.284: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 284. (A.R. No. 366 of 1920.) CHITRACHĒḌU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the Īśvara temple.

This is dated in the cyclic year Śrīmukha, Āshāḍa ba. 3. The cyclic year Śrīmukha falling in the reign of Śrī Raṅga I corresponds to Śaka 1495. Āshāḍha was an intercalary month in Śrīmukha and the details would correspond to 1573 A.D., July 17, (Friday) if the month quoted is taken as Nija-Āshāḍha.

It records that the mānya lands of the temples and brāhmaṇas of Chitrachēḍu-Malakatāḷa which had fallen into desuetude were re-granted as sarvamānya by Raṅgājeṭṭi for the merit of his father Nimmājeṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
śakavaruṣaṁ
gunēṭi śrīmukha saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha
ba 3 lu śrīman ma paramēśvara
vīrapratāpa śrīraṁgarāyadēvamahārāyalu
penugoṁḍapaṭnamaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai
pṛdhivisāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁnuṁḍagānu śrīma
tu parāśara gōtṛlaina raṁgājeṭigāru citracēḍi malaka
tāḷa dēvabrāṁhmaṇamāṁnyālaku yicina dha¨rmasilāśā
sanakramameṭlaṁnanu māku Amaramāgāṇi bāliṁcina
gutti sīmalōni citracēḍi malakatāḷa dēvabrāṁhmaṇamānyālu
madhye tiguppalu tiyagānu tiyyakuṁḍānu sa¨rvamā
nyaṁgānu raghunāthadēvuni saṁnidhini tama taṁḍri niṁmājeṭṭi
ki puṇyaṁgānu vuttānadvādaśi puṇyakālamaṁdu ti
lu sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu dhārabōstimi yi dēvabrāṁhmaṇa
mānyālaku marē Ātaṁkaṁ lēkuṁḍānu kōṭārulōna
paḍakuṁḍānu sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpū¨rvakaṁ
gā trivācakaṁgānu dēvabrāṁhmaṇamānyāla kolcu kō
lōna paḍakuṁḍānu tiguppalu tiyyakuṁḍānu sa
[¨rvamā]nyaṁgānu dhāravōsi yiccina dha¨rmaśilāśāsanaṁ . yi
dēvabrāhmaṇamānyālaku yavaru ganaka Āsiṁcinā
nu tama talitaṁḍṟla vāraṇāsilō vadhiyiṁcinavā
ru mātṛgamanaṁśēśinavāru sonakamāṁsaṁ tiṁnna
vāru . svadatāṁ paradatāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rā . saṣṭi¨rvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
